programme.title: FOOD ADVENTURE

programme.title: THE SULTAN ENTERTAINMENT
programme.desc: The Sultan is a talk show featuring two sultan-like hosts: Sultan Andara and Raffi Ahmad and Sultan Bintaro and Andre Taulany, accompanied by a cast of beautiful and handsome employees. It features spectacular guest stars and is definitely not to be missed. Find out more at The Sultan Entertainment.

programme.title: JALAN - JALAN S2
programme.desc: A program that provides information about interesting places for vacations.

programme.title: DISEBELAH ADA SURGA
programme.desc: The story of three young men named Andhika, Gading, and Uus. All three of them lack spiritual depth. They have spent their youth living carefree lives, indulging in pleasure without a care in the world about their future.

programme.title: Sudah Jatuh Ketiban Duren Iya Lagi Iya Lagi
programme.desc: Juna, a durian tycoon who owns a durian orchard, meets Ambar, unaware that Juna is the boss of the durian orchard that Ambar is looking after. Juna, who is sick because it's his first time working in the field, doesn't get any attention from Maya. But suddenly Maya cheats on him with Aldo. Juna, who finds out, is disappointed with Maya.

programme.title: Cinta Abang Tamvan Pantang Disayurin
programme.desc: Nando (Morgan Oey) helps Sesil (Rayna Snova), who is about to be sold abroad. Nando asks his mother for permission to let Sesil stay at her house.

programme.title: BINTANG PANTURA 6
programme.desc: Bintang Pantura 6 is back! The legendary 'Juragan' Soimah, joined by her trusty assistant Nunung and business partner Inul Daratista, is on a mission to find 40 talented contestants. Who will make the cut and finally perform on the stage of their dreams?

programme.title: Garam dan Madu Aku Biro Kamu Mau?
programme.desc: A beautiful girl named Fuji (Larasati Nugroho), the owner of a matchmaking agency. One day, Fuji gets a client, a barbershop owner's son named Ivan (Arya Vasco). From there, Ivan is asked by his mother to find a partner. Until finally, Ivan, the barbershop owner, says, "Why don't you be my partner, and I introduce you to my mother?"

programme.title: Mahkotamu Ketinggalan di DC Cakung Queen
programme.desc: Keyla was shocked to meet Roy at the market. Roy accidentally saw Keyla, Keyla immediately ran into the market and accidentally hit Yudi in the market. The fruit that Yudi brought was all messed up. Keyla rushed to avoid Roy. Keyla wanted to find her family who had been separated for a long time.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton takes self-defense lessons from Sandy; Mr. Krabs hits the gym after a beach challenge from Larry.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton tries to befriend Squidward so he can get the Krabby Patty formula; the citizens of Bikini Bottom clamor for Patrick's artwork after an art critic praises him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Patrick has a coupon for free ice cream, but he has to get to the store if he wants to use it; Mr. Krabs buys Squidward's art, but to make a profit on his purchase he will have to get the artist out of the picture.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs decides to start selling hot dogs; SpongeBob and Patrick discover a lost ship.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When SpongeBob and Pat sell candy bars door to door, they end up buying more than they sell; superheroes visit.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: The Chum Bucket is replaced by a flower shop with a charming new owner; the Krusty Krab enters a float in the annual Bikini Bottom Parade.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob takes his turn as hall monitor; SpongeBob brings home a wild jellyfish.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick go on an advertising blitz to drum up business for the Krusty Krab; Mr. Krabs and Plankton circulate petitions about the bulldozing of a Bikini Bottom restaurant.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs' old fry cook pays a visit to the Krusty Krab; SpongeBob invests in night lights to ward off the boogeyman.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: A strange moon turns everyone in town into wild animals, and Sandy is the only one who can save them; Patrick is sleepwalking, and SpongeBob is unable to wake him up.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When the key to the vault holding the Krabby Patty recipe is lost, SpongeBob must locate it before the recipe is lost forever.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When stray snails begin appearing around Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob decides to care for them himself; Patrick enters a Krabby Patty eating competition in order to defend Bikini Bottom's honor.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: The Krusty Krab crew goes to a big concert to sell Krabby Patties in the stands; SpongeBob explores the melodious dreamscapes of his sleeping neighbors.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs tries to sell a moldy krabby patty; Spongebob breaks his butt while sand sledding.

programme.title: Rock Paper Scissors
programme.desc: Scissors helps Paper have a weekend interesting enough to impress Pencil; even more exciting: Rock buys a hat; Rock, Paper and Scissors try to prove they shouldn't be replaced by their incredible new friend, Putty.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When a gang of kids steals the Krusty Krab's grill, SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs go to extreme lengths to win it back; SpongeBob helps out the Krusty Krab's night shift crew, but the customers crave something creepier than usual.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton's giant Chum Bucket glove runs wild in town, but SpongeBob has a handy friend to help them out; SpongeBob takes his first break ever at work.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When Pat suddenly grows a grown-up beard, he decides it's time to act like a grown-up, too; while preparing to give an oral report for boating school, SpongeBob realizes that he's got a case of stage fright.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick accidentally board a ship full of prisoners; SpongeBob and Patrick find themselves left behind on one of Sandy's extreme wilderness expeditions.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Karen tells the fairy tale of a nerd trying to steal an action figure from his three little neighbors; Squidward hosts a secret We Hate SpongeBob Club at his house.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs sends SpongeBob and Patrick to spy on Plankton; Squidward and SpongeBob make an instructional video on boating techniques; Mr. Krabs holds a contest.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob house-sits for Sandy; SpongeBob and Squidward go to the Kelpy G concert.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick are cursed when they anger the Flying Dutchman; Squidward and SpongeBob must share a locker.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick go back in time to see the young Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy; SpongeBob and Patrick watch their heroes fight bad guys.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward finds SpongeBob's diary, and starts reading it out loud in the Krusty Krab; SpongeBob fails his driving test, forcing Mrs Puff to think outside the box and off the road.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: While working the graveyard shift, Squidward tells SpongeBob a scary story about the Hash Slinging Slasher; Mr. Krabs is smitten with Ms. Puff.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick turn SpongeBob's house into an indoor miniature golf course! When SpongeBob realizes how many memories are attached to all of his possessions, he is reluctant to throw anything way.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to help Sandy rid her dome of fleas; Patrick accidentally takes SpongeBob's doughnut; SpongeBob washes dishes at the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton teams up with Man Ray to take over the Krusty Krab and then the world.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob brings home a box of new snail treats for Gary; when Plankton wins a free Krabby Patty, Mr. Krabs tries to keep him from collecting his prize.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Once Fred's leg heals up, SpongeBob is determined to keep it out of harm's way; Patrick's lemonade stand is unsuccessful until he gets a secret ingredient from Squidward.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton masquerades as Gary to steal the Krabby Patty formula; SpongeBob and Patrick play hide and seek.

programme.title: Rock Paper Scissors
programme.desc: Rock quests for an ancient artifact in order to prove he is worthy of working with his modeling role model, Franz Roll; Paper and Scissors compete to be more supportive of Rock in the hopes that one of them will head his entourage.

programme.title: Rock Paper Scissors
programme.desc: Rock and Scissors learn that Paper invents better when angry; his friends try to enrage him; after Scissors breaks his arm, he tries to hide it from Paper.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lori struggles to make a good impression on Bobby's dad after accidentally pushing him into a puddle; desperate to have the best show-and-tell in class, Lily takes Lisa's shrink ray to school.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln convinces his teacher, Mr. Bolhofner, to join the Doo-Dads in order to get a better seat in class; after Lincoln tries to help Lynn get over a heckler at her soccer game, the Louds realize they all have critics.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lola realizes that double the cuteness could help her break into show business, so she teams up with Lily; Lori vows to make up for lost time in her senior year.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After Walt's failed attempt at romance, Charles, Cliff and Geo try to find their pal a love connection; Lincoln and Clyde beg their parents to let them go to space cadets camp, but it's not as fun as they expected.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When the kids break Mom and Dad's priceless vase, they decide the only thing to do is go back in time to their wedding day and prevent them from ever receiving it.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lola struggles to dampen her sweet tooth when mom challenges her to go an entire week without added sugar; Lincoln strives to impress the Amazing Brailster when he's chosen to be his assistant at the Illusion Château.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Liam fills in as a reporter, the school soon falls in love with Liam's life on Hunnicutt Farms; when Lynn is scouted for her athletic prowess, she soon becomes a professional wrestler.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: On a dark and stormy night, Tim and Boss Baby set traps for two wildly different threats: a mythical monster and a Puppy Co. agent named Bug the Pug.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: After being framed for the Puppy Co. leak, a fugitive Boss Baby goes on the lam and comes face to face with an old corporate rival.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: After a freak jousting accident, SpongeBob and Patrick are transported to a medieval version of Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Sandy Squirrel is homesick; Plankton tries to get SpongeBob to be mean.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Pearl gets a job to be cool like her friends, but the only store that is hiring is the lamest store at the mall; SpongeBob loses the use of his thumbs.

programme.desc: 3 Mak Dara kembali untuk Musim Kedua dengan nafas baharu yang lebih bersahaja dan santai. Dihoskan oleh tiga orang selebriti tanah air iaitu Raja Azura, Sharifah Shahora dan Rita Rudaini.

programme.title: Seribu Nina Ep06
programme.desc: Straight-laced Amar is having second thoughts about marrying his free-spirited girlfriend, Nina. But when Nina is kidnapped, he must embark on an interdimensional journey to find his love.

programme.title: Inspirasi Duniamu Ep01
programme.desc: Inspirasi TVS merupakan segmen berita istimewa yang disampaikan oleh selebriti tempatan dengan mengetengahkan laporan berkaitan rakyat, hiburan serta topik trending.

programme.title: Echoes From the North Ep02
programme.desc: Explores the dance traditions of the Bisaya, Kenyah, and Lun Bawang groups in north Sarawak, highlighting the culture, resilience, and spirit of indigenous peoples through captivating stories and visuals.

programme.title: (L) TVS Nightline
programme.desc: Memaparkan laporan peristiwa yang berlaku di seluruh Malaysia dalam bahasa English

programme.title: Goblin Ep01
programme.desc: Kim Shin, an immortal goblin, goes to find a human bride to remove an invisible sword from his chest and end his life. One day, school student Ji Eun-Tak confesses to him that she is the chosen one.

programme.title: Kek & Pastri Ep03
programme.desc: Seorang selebriti, menghasilkan resepi baharu untuk kek, pastri, dan hidangan savouri dengan menggunakan bahan-bahan tempatan dan teknik membakar dan mengukus untuk mencipta hidangan yang lazat and inovatif

programme.title: Sumandak Takes Borneo Ep10
programme.desc: Dewi Remaja 2022 winner Tracie and two friends explore Borneo's beauty food,history,culture,nature, and diversity while uplifting communities through local social enterprises in this inspiring travelogue.

programme.title: Kediaman Agro Ep10
programme.desc: 'KEDIAMAN AGRO' merupakan program dokumentari yang menumpukan kepada teknologi penanaman makanan berskala kecil seperti di kawasan rumah, mahupun mini kebun.

programme.title: Salam Nusantara Ep11
programme.desc: Mengungkap lebih banyak khazanah negeri Sarawak yang masih belum lagi diketahui oleh khalayak awam khasnya tentang perkembangan tamadun masyarakat majmuk Sarawak termasuklah umat Islam di negeri ini.

programme.title: Caves & Caverns Ep05
programme.desc: Our hostess explores Borneo's hidden gems, documenting her experiences, flora, fauna, paragliding, bird watching, and stunning sunsets, ensuring a captivating and exciting adventure.

programme.title: Setenang Mata Memandang Ep05
programme.desc: Travelogue program that follows two hosts on their journey to discover hidden gems in Sarawak's natural beauty, including national parks, mountains, valleys, lakes, rivers, waterfalls, and islands.

programme.title: My Journey With Nature Ep04
programme.desc: Pengembaraan seorang wanita ke kawasan pendalaman yang belum diterokai diceritakan dalam 'My Journey with Nature', yang menampilkan tarikan pelancongan alam semula jadi.

programme.title: Borneo Dive Ep02
programme.desc: Explore the unique dive sites of Sabah and Sarawak, which attract both local and international divers. The region offers a rich variety of marine life for recreational and avid divers to observe.

programme.title: Pejalai Kamek Orang Ep09
programme.desc: Hosted and narrated by Tony Eusoff, traces locations and stories from people who have heard, experienced and witnessed events right from Brooke Era in 1841 leading up to Sarawak's independence in July 1971

programme.title: 3 Mak Dara S2 Ep06
programme.desc: 3 Mak Dara kembali untuk Musim Kedua dengan nafas baharu yang lebih bersahaja dan santai. Dihoskan oleh tiga orang selebriti tanah air iaitu Raja Azura, Sharifah Shahora dan Rita Rudaini.

programme.title: Roots & Remedies Ep13
programme.desc: ROOTS and REMEDIES is a documentary that delves into Sarawak's traditional medicinal plants and health practices, showcasing their efficacy in treating ailments and daily treatments.

programme.title: The 355
programme.desc: When a top-secret weapon falls into mercenary hands, a wild-card C.I.A. agent joins forces with three international agents on a mission to retrieve it.

programme.title: Vanguard
programme.desc: Covert security company Vanguard is the last hope of survival for an accountant after he is targeted by the world's deadliest mercenary organization.

programme.title: Like Sunday, Like Rain
programme.desc: Living with abundant resources, 12-year-old cello prodigy Reggie lives a solitary life in Manhattan; estranged from family, jobless, and having boyfriend problems.

programme.title: The Perfect Weapon
programme.desc: In the not so distant future, society is controlled by the powerful State and a dictator known as the Director. Condor works as a hitman for the State, but a reunion with someone he thought was dead forces him to consider who his enemies really are.

programme.title: The Humanity Bureau
programme.desc: A dystopian thriller set in the year 2030 that sees the world in a permanent state of economic recession and facing serious environmental problems as a result of global warming.

programme.title: Mile 22
programme.desc: A small team of elite American intelligence officers, part of a top-secret tactical command unit, try to smuggle a mysterious police officer with sensitive information out of Indonesia.
